languages.text: "Архмилитант? В таком юном возрасте? Впрочем, моя Лария получила титул сенешаля, едва переступив порог совершеннолетия".
"Arch-Militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of Seneschal as soon as she came of age."
languages.original_text: "Архмилитант? В таком юном возрасте? Впрочем, моя Лария получила титул сенешаля, едва переступив порог совершеннолетия".

traits.locale_text: "Arch-Militant? At such a young age? Still, my Laria earned the title of seneschal as soon as she came of age."
"Arch-Militant? At such a young age? Still, my Laria earned the title of seneschal as soon as she came of age."
"Arch-militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of seneschal as soon as she came of age."
"Arch-militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of seneschal as soon as she came of age."

languages.text: "{nc|Erzmilitant|Erzmilitantin}? In so jungen Jahren? Meine Laria erhielt den Titel der Truchsessin als sie mündig wurde."
languages.original_text: "Arch-Militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of Seneschal as soon as she came of age."

traits.locale_text: "{nc|Erzmilitant|Erzmilitantin}? In so jungen Jahren? Meine Laria erhielt den Titel der Truchsessin als sie mündig wurde."

languages.text: « Une archimilitante ? Si jeune ? Enfin, ma Laria a bien reçu le titre de sénéchale dès que son âge l'a permis, après tout. »
languages.original_text: "Arch-Militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of Seneschal as soon as she came of age."

traits.locale_text: « Une archimilitante ? Si jeune ? Enfin, ma Laria a bien reçu le titre de sénéchale dès que son âge l'a permis, après tout. »

languages.text: «¿Archimilitante? ¿Tan joven? Supongo que mi Laria se ganó el cargo de Senescal con la mayoría de edad».
languages.original_text: "Arch-Militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of Seneschal as soon as she came of age."

traits.locale_text: «¿Archimilitante? ¿Tan joven? Supongo que mi Laria se ganó el cargo de Senescal con la mayoría de edad».

languages.text: "Başmilitan mı? Bu genç yaşında mı? Sanırım benim Laria'm da reşit olur olmaz Seneşal ünvanını kazanmıştı."
languages.original_text: "Arch-Militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of Seneschal as soon as she came of age."

traits.locale_text: "Başmilitan mı? Bu genç yaşında mı? Sanırım benim Laria'm da reşit olur olmaz Seneşal ünvanını kazanmıştı."

languages.text: “首席战士？这么年轻？想来我的菈丽雅也是一成年就拿下了总领头衔。”
languages.original_text: "Arch-Militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of Seneschal as soon as she came of age."

traits.locale_text: “首席战士？这么年轻？想来我的菈丽雅也是一成年就拿下了总领头衔。”

languages.text: 「大軍人？そんな若さで？私のラリアは成人した途端、センシャルの称号を得たのでしょう」
languages.original_text: "Arch-Militant? At such a young age? I suppose my Laria earned the title of Seneschal as soon as she came of age."

traits.locale_text: 「大軍人？そんな若さで？私のラリアは成人した途端、センシャルの称号を得たのでしょう」
